# instancez

> A lightweight, self-hosted backend that speaks the Supabase wire protocol.

## Documentation Sets

- [Abridged documentation](https://instancez.github.io/llms-small.txt): a compact version of the documentation for instancez, with non-essential content removed
- [Complete documentation](https://instancez.github.io/llms-full.txt): the full documentation for instancez

## Notes

- The complete documentation includes all content from the official documentation
- The content is automatically generated from the same source as the official documentation
